title: The Most-Watched TV Shows And Movies Right Now
text: Based on viewing minutes for the most recent week, The Pitt on HBO Max ranked first with 1.39 billion minutes, The Boys on Prime Video ranked second with 918 million minutes, Big Mistakes on Netflix ranked third with 580 million minutes, Euphoria on HBO Max ranked fourth with 556 million minutes, and Beef on Netflix ranked fifth with 498 million minutes. The page notes that The Pitt achieved a series high in viewership during its final week, while the medical drama demonstrated consistent growth compared to the previous season. This data reflects real-time viewing patterns and helps identify which shows are commanding the most attention from audiences across major streaming platforms.
